title: Two questions
wikitext:
[]: Two questions             Quote Post by visionfactory » Fri Sep 03, 2010 10:11 pm 1) There is a countdown in eva store site, what is it for? what's going to happen in XX hours? 2) How many months before the actual screening of Evangelion on theaters was announced the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Sep 03, 2010 11:09 pm Well I believe I can answer #1. It's a clock.

[]:             Quote Post by visionfactory » Sat Sep 04, 2010 12:07 am oh I feel so stupid now...... thanks

[]: Killer Bee uses GUESSWORK! It's not very effective...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Sep 04, 2010 10:01 am A date hasn't been set for the theatrical release of 2.0, but the DVD/Blu-ray is slated for Spring 2011(probably in March). The limited theatrical release will probably take place several months earlier, so I'm guessing somewhere around November to January.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Sat Sep 04, 2010 1:15 pm Well 1.0 in North America came out early this year after being originally released in 2007. A few select screening occurred in 2009 though. While it will be faster for Funimation to gain the rights to localize 2.0 after already getting 1.0, the former is an extra thirty minutes long. So any advantage the fast right acquiring gives will properly be canceled by more translation and voice acting time. So 2.0 will properly have screenings in 2011 and be out in 2012.

[]: You are wrong and I am right. Discuss.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Sep 04, 2010 4:57 pm Gamer137 wrote: Well 1.0 in North America came out early this year after being originally released in 2007. A few select screening occurred in 2009 though.
